Site diary

Daily site diary

One entry per project per shift - captured from field, rolled into performance reporting.

Day
11 May 2026

Northline M9 Upgrade

by Liam C.

Pour of abutment 4 completed early. Reinforcement crews mobilised to pier 3 in afternoon. No safety incidents.

64

Crew

18

Plant

10.5h

Hours

Clear, 19°C
productive
Day
11 May 2026

Kingsbridge Precinct

by Hana O.

Façade install at L8 west progressed two bays. Crane B taken offline for scheduled service.

86

Crew

6

Plant

9h

Hours

Overcast, 14°C
maintenance
Night
10 May 2026

Harbour Rail Junction

by Ren K.

Possession executed without delay. Ballast packed across section 4. Sleepers staged for tomorrow.

22

Crew

4

Plant

8h

Hours

Showers, 18°C
possession
Day
10 May 2026

Northline M9 Upgrade

by Eli M.

Geotech rig delayed by mobilisation issue - schedule slip of 24h on BH-12. Communicated to PM.

60

Crew

20

Plant

10h

Hours

Clear, 21°C
delay
Day
10 May 2026

Redcliff Water Treatment

by Indra R.

Membrane installation across bay 3 completed. Heat policy active - additional water stations rotated.

36

Crew

8

Plant

9h

Hours

Hot, 31°C
heat policy
